title: erigeron fuertesii
intro: Erigeron fuertesii, also known as the Puerto Rican fleabane, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family. This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Erigeron fuertesii include its potential to reduce inflammation, soothe wounds, and combat infections, making it a valuable natural remedy. Erigeron fuertesii can be prepared as an infusion, tincture, or salve, and is often used in herbal medicine to support skin health and immune function.
